resources.title: Rawkode Academy Courses Repository
resources.evidence_quote: You can find the resources for this course at github dot com slash rockode academy. I have started adding the materials to the courses repository.

resources.title: Flux VS Code Extension
resources.evidence_quote: you'll see that there is this Versus code extension from InfluxData. You can add connections... local host.

resources.title: Rawkode Academy Discord
resources.evidence_quote: Use the Discord to ask for help. Use the comments to ask for help. I'm here.
